scripts.format: biome format --write apps packages scripts tests biome.json package.json .stylelintrc.json playwright.config.ts
scripts.format:check: biome format biome.json package.json .stylelintrc.json playwright.config.ts apps/hub/package.json apps/overlay-server/package.json tests
scripts.lint: biome lint apps packages scripts tests playwright.config.ts
scripts.test: node apps/overlay-server/node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --root apps/overlay-server && node apps/hub/node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --root apps/hub
